source_pr.title: executor: support chunk for IndexLookupReader.
source_pr.body: And decouple indexWorker and tableWorker from index lookup executor.

symptoms: rs, err := tk.Exec("select * from chk order by k") (new_session_test.go)
failure_signature: rs, err := tk.Exec("select * from chk order by k") (new_session_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: rs, err := tk.Exec("select * from chk order by k") (new_session_test.go)
files: executor/builder.go, executor/distsql.go, executor/distsql_test.go, new_session_test.go, util/chunk/chunk.go
